articles.title: Cape DA investigating alleged threats at Sandwich Middle High
articles.description:

summary: Cape DA investigates threats reported at Sandwich Middle High School.

articles.title: Is the Trump administration on the verge of further endangering North Atlantic right whales?
articles.description:
Experts say maritime slow zones protect the whales, but a major rollback of these rules could be on the horizon.

The post Is the Trump administration on the verge of further endangering North Atlantic right whales? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Experts warn of potential rollback of maritime slow zones for North Atlantic right whales.
North Atlantic right whale population is critically low, with only about 340 individuals remaining.
Boston residents may face increased risks to marine wildlife and local fishing industries.
